title.en: After all, he still has to play a big role in t...

content.en:
Soon.

Ye Tian's other four replica bodies came to the Winter Night Fortress and sat here and there, but they were all hidden at the beginning and were not exposed.

After all, he still has to play a big role in the next Dao Void Demon invasion!

......

"Breakthrough!"

Ye Tian felt the cultivation of the sixfold to the late stage of the Dao Realm on his body, and smiled.

The next step is to raise the cultivation to the peak realm of the sixfold Dao realm.

At that time, he would be able to go and attack the Sevenfold Dao Realm.

With his fifth sequence to the Dao Rule Realm, it is naturally not difficult to impact the Sevenfold Dao Realm.

"If I break through to the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, my combat power will definitely be comparable to the ordinary Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm!" Ye Tian estimated.

In addition to the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, he also wanted to ascend to the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Realm.

However, if he slowly comprehended it himself, the efficiency was too slow, and if he could obtain a large number of Black Abyss Devouring Stones, he would be able to quickly improve the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule.

"Maybe the Su Domain Lord knows about the Black Abyss Devouring Stone!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

this day.

Ye Tian communicated with the Lord of Su Yu.

"Domain Lord Su, do you know about the Black Abyss Devouring Stone?" Ye Tian asked.

"Know!" Su Domain Lord nodded, "The Black Abyss Devouring Stone is a good thing, it contains a special substance inside, which can allow the Supreme Dao Realm to spy on and comprehend the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, but unfortunately this substance has too many side effects, eroding the origin, even if it is the Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm, it can't bear it, even if it is refined, the origin is damaged, even if it really comprehends the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, it will never be able to break through to become the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm, and even the combat power will decline." "

"Where can the Innate Origin Domain Alliance obtain this Black Abyss Devouring Stone?" Ye Tian asked.

"Ye Domain Lord, do you want the Black Abyss Devouring Stone?"

Lord Su asked.

"It's just research!" Ye Tian didn't say explicitly.

The Su Domain Lord pondered for a while, and then said: "This kind of thing is very rare, mainly because the side effects are too great, and it is basically used to refine some special weapons, and there are very few ways to use it. Even we Sioux don't have this thing. But it's not that it can't be found, if the Ye Domain Lord needs it, I can inquire. "

The reason why she is willing to help Ye Tian is mainly because she likes Ye Tian, her talent is really demonic, if Ye Tian can break through to the Eightfold Dao Realm, even the Su Clan will be polite to Ye Tian.

And according to her understanding, Ye Tian had already comprehended the rules of the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao, and if he cultivated steadily, he would definitely be able to become the Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm.

Therefore, Ye Tian is worth his investment.

"Then thank you Su Domain Lord!"

Ye Tian thanked.

......

Soon after, the Su Domain Lord summoned Ye Tian and gave him information about the Black Abyss Devouring Stone.

"There is a Black Abyss Devouring Stone in the Black Pole Forest!"

"The Innate Origin Domain Alliance Treasury also has a lot of Black Abyss Devouring Stones, but they are not currently available for exchange!"

"There are also thirteen forces, and there are also Black Abyss Devouring Stones!"

This information is very useful to Ye Tian.

However, those forces are very powerful, and they are not short of resources, even if the Black Abyss Devouring Stone is useless to them, they will not trade it!

It's like something that Ye Tian doesn't use, when others trade things that are useless with him, he won't pay attention to the other party.

"Black Pole Forest!"

Ye Tian set his sights on this place.

The Black Pole Forest is a strange place located in the Void Domain, which is very dangerous, allowing the Sevenfold Dao Realm to enter and the Eightfold Dao Realm to enter, and the strength will be suppressed to the point that it can only exert one-tenth of its strength.

You can't enter the Nine Realms of the Dao Realm, and in the Black Pole Forest, you have to pay attention to luck, and if you are unlucky, you will be absorbed by an inexplicable thing and die in an instant.

As for what it is, I haven't figured it out yet.

Even so, there are Supreme Dao Void Demons or Supreme Dao Realms who are willing to break in and try it, because there are really a lot of good things there.

Of course, since the place is located in the Void Domain, it is more troublesome to enter the Dao Realm.

The Lord of the Su Domain not only informed the Black Pole Forest, but also gave the location.

"It's a bit far!"

Ye Tian frowned.

However, he didn't need to go over by himself, he could completely let his Supreme Dao Void Demon copy his body to go over.

Now, the Supreme Dao Void Demon has invaded the Innate Origin Domain on a large scale, but it will not care about the Black Pole Forest, now is a good time to enter the Black Pole Forest.

......

The years passed.

Ye Tian's Supreme Dao Void Demon copy body kept shuttling through the Void Domain, heading to the Black Pole Forest, but he was often caught strong, either by this Supreme Dao Void Demon Pulse, or by that Supreme Dao Void Demon Bloodline, and sent to the Supreme Dao Void Demon Legion.

But.

He was looking for a chance to slip away.

Finally, after a long time, he rushed to the Black Pole Forest.

"The Black Pole Forest has arrived, and there is really no Supreme Dao Void Demon here!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he copied his true body copy body, and only the real body copy body could survive in the Black Pole Forest, and the Supreme Dao Void Demon Copy Body was too weak.

Swish!

Ye Tian broke into the Black Pole Forest, and endless strange black trees appeared around him.

There was a strange aura permeating these strange black trees, and this strangeness seemed to be derived from the rules of the Supreme Dao, merging into these trees, making them indestructible.

Many of the Dao Void Demon Clan's Dao Void Demons would break into here, so many of these good things were taken away by them, and although there were a lot of remaining resources, it was not worth Ye Tian's time.

His goal is to find the Black Abyss Devouring Stone.

Time passes.

Ye Tian searched again and again, and finally found a Black Abyss Devouring Stone.

Then, he immediately sent it out and continued to go in.

In this way, one after another of the Black Abyss Devouring Stone was found.

But suddenly, he was unlucky and couldn't move.

Click!

The replica body was reduced to ashes.

"What's the matter, my copy body was suddenly killed!"

He couldn't even resist for a moment.

This Black Pole Forest is so weird!

"Of course, he was lucky to be killed after looking for so long. "

Ye Tian condensed another copy body and continued to enter the Black Pole Forest.

In this way, one after another Black Abyss Devouring Stones were found by Ye Tian, but the duplicate body was also lost one after another.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had already obtained a lot of Black Abyss Devouring Stones, but the Black Abyss Devouring Stones here were becoming more and more difficult to find.

Ye Tian's true body copy body was also nearby, and he began to refine the Black Abyss Devouring Stone to comprehend the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules.

And just like that, some time passed.

this day.

Winter Night's Fortress.

The second wave of the Void Demon's attack began.
